manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
▢ X ▢ X ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢

message.content: .DESCRIPTION: A 5x5 grid. Row 1: X in columns 1 and 5, blanks in columns 2‑4. Row 2: X in columns 2 and 4, blanks elsewhere. Row 3: X in column 3, blanks elsewhere. Row 4: X in column 3, blanks elsewhere. Row 5: X in column 3, blanks elsewhere.
message.reasoning: The user wants a short grid description starting with "DESCRIPTION:". Must not add anything else. Provide the description. Ensure format exactly

reasoning_details.text: The user wants a short grid description starting with "DESCRIPTION:". Must not add anything else. Provide the description. Ensure format exactly

clem_player.response: .DESCRIPTION: A 5x5 grid. Row 1: X in columns 1 and 5, blanks in columns 2‑4. Row 2: X in columns 2 and 4, blanks elsewhere. Row 3: X in column 3, blanks elsewhere. Row 4: X in column 3, blanks elsewhere. Row 5: X in column 3, blanks elsewhere.
